title: Grip check
detail: Neutral grip, see two knuckles on the lead hand, thumbs pointing just right of centre. Ten slow re-grips.

title: Setup & posture
detail: Athletic hinge from the hips, soft knees, arms hanging under the shoulders. Check alignment to a target line.

title: Slow-motion swings
detail: Ten swings at half speed, feeling the takeaway, top position, and a balanced finish held for three seconds.

title: Mirror — top of backswing
detail: Check the top position in a mirror: lead arm across the chest, club roughly on plane, weight into the trail side.

title: Tempo count
detail: Swing to a 3:1 rhythm (long back, quick through). Twenty reps counting out loud.
